Name: M11S-MCH
Note: M11S Machinist HiAuRo timeline by Kairo. This concrete axis keeps the old M11S strategy while using only HiAuRo-native execution nodes and KairoMCH trigger discriminators. The fight is treated as a normal dummy rotation except the six-minute Majestic Meteor phase: heat is briefly held around 46148 Explosion, then released on 46150 Fire Breath so the six-minute package does not double-Hypercharge through tower and knockback downtime. This axis does not use ReleaseDelayedBurstPackage and does not re-anchor the 120s cycle. Potion plan defaults to 0 / 5 / 10 through KairoMCHPotion requests. Progression fallback can be 0 / 6 / 10:30 by moving the middle potion manually after the three meteor explosions and two GCDs. The five-minute potion reserves Reassemble from 278s, holds strong GCD at 298s so the 5:00 Drill cannot go naked before potion, releases Reassemble plus strong GCD at 302s, and clears at 312s. Mitigation is boss-spell gated with Tactician and Dismantle; Dismantle selects boss DataId 3913 before TriggerActionHighPrioritySlot.
Author: Kairo
ExposedVarDesc: Kairo MCH M11S timeline variables. 0 = off, 1 = on. Use KairoMCHTimelineVariable for hold/release/reset actions.

TriggerConds.Remark: hold strong GCD before five-minute potion

TriggerActions.Remark: prevent naked Drill before five-minute potion
dump strong GCD after five-minute potion
dump Reassemble target after five-minute potion
prevent Barrel Stabilizer before meteor downtime
avoid double Hypercharge before Fire Breath
